---
title: "Recruitment Materials"
subtitle: "Email and LMS"
---

**Subject:** Optional AI Lab Session for [Unit Code]

Hello [Unit Name] students,

You're invited to an optional on-campus AI lab session (45-60 mins) exploring how to get better results from AI tools. You'll complete a short, course-relevant task using a university-provided AI chat interface (no personal accounts needed). Afterwards, there's a brief exit survey.

- **Voluntary:** Not assessed; won't affect your grades.
- **When/where:** [Dates, location]. Multiple times offered.
- **Privacy:** We don't collect your name/student ID. Conversations are tagged only with a session code.
- **Consent:** Read the PIS and complete the digital consent form: [Insert Link].

Questions? Contact [PI email].
